raw_entries.text: Match ends, Germany 2, Côte d'Ivoire 1.
Second Half ends, Germany 2, Côte d'Ivoire 1.
Goal! Germany 2, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Deniz Undav (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Felix Nmecha with a through ball.
Foul by Guéla Doué (Côte d'Ivoire).
Florian Wirtz (Germany) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt saved. Nadiem Amiri (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Deniz Undav.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
Attempt saved. Nathaniel Brown (Germany) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Florian Wirtz.
Foul by Evann Guessand (Côte d'Ivoire).
Felix Nmecha (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Deniz Undav (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Joshua Kimmich with a headed pass.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Nicolas Pépé replaces Yan Diomande.
Substitution, Germany. Leon Goretzka replaces Kai Havertz.
Attempt blocked. Seko Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Simon Adingra.
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Jonathan Tah.
Yan Diomande (Côte d'Ivoire) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Florian Wirtz (Germany).
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Guéla Doué replaces Wilfried Singo because of an injury.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match (Germany).
Delay in match because of an injury Wilfried Singo (Côte d'Ivoire).
Christ Inao Oulaï (Côte d'Ivoire) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Felix Nmecha (Germany).
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Evann Guessand replaces Ange-Yoan Bonny.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Seko Fofana replaces Ibrahim Sangaré.
Substitution, Côte d'Ivoire. Simon Adingra replaces Amad Diallo.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Goal! Germany 1, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Deniz Undav (Germany) left footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Nadiem Amiri with a cross.
Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Deniz Undav (Germany).
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Ibrahim Sangaré.
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Wilfried Singo.
Attempt missed. Kai Havertz (Germany) header from the right side of the six yard box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Joshua Kimmich with a cross following a corner.
Attempt missed. Jamie Leweling (Germany) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Deniz Undav.
Substitution, Germany. Jamie Leweling replaces Leroy Sané.
Substitution, Germany. Deniz Undav replaces Jamal Musiala.
Substitution, Germany. Nadiem Amiri replaces Aleksandar Pavlovic.
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Amad Diallo.
Foul by Ange-Yoan Bonny (Côte d'Ivoire).
Jonathan Tah (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Antonio Rüdiger (Germany) right footed shot from more than 35 yards is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Jonathan Tah.
Attempt missed. Yan Diomande (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left.
Foul by Yan Diomande (Côte d'Ivoire).
Aleksandar Pavlovic (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Felix Nmecha.
Attempt missed. Christ Inao Oulaï (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Amad Diallo following a fast break.
Attempt blocked. Franck Kessie (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Amad Diallo.
Attempt blocked. Ghislain Konan (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Christ Inao Oulaï.
Second Half begins Germany 0, Côte d'Ivoire 1.
Substitution, Germany. Antonio Rüdiger replaces Nico Schlotterbeck because of an injury.
First Half ends, Germany 0, Côte d'Ivoire 1.
Attempt saved. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Felix Nmecha.
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Nico Schlotterbeck.
Attempt blocked. Felix Nmecha (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Emmanuel Agbadou.
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.
Attempt blocked. Jamal Musiala (Germany) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Attempt blocked. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Jamal Musiala.
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Ghislain Konan.
Foul by Franck Kessie (Côte d'Ivoire).
Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Odilon Kossounou (Côte d'Ivoire) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Jamal Musiala (Germany).
Attempt saved. Ange-Yoan Bonny (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Manuel Neuer (Germany). Assisted by Yan Diomande.
Handball by Christ Inao Oulaï (Côte d'Ivoire).
Attempt blocked. Amad Diallo (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from very close range is blocked. Assisted by Yan Diomande with a cross.
Goal! Germany 0, Côte d'Ivoire 1. Franck Kessie (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Delay in match because of an injury Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire).
Attempt blocked. Felix Nmecha (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Nico Schlotterbeck.
Foul by Aleksandar Pavlovic (Germany).
Attempt missed. Jamal Musiala (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Aleksandar Pavlovic.
Delay in match because of an injury Nico Schlotterbeck (Germany).
Attempt blocked. Wilfried Singo (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Foul by Wilfried Singo (Côte d'Ivoire).
Attempt saved. Kai Havertz (Germany) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Joshua Kimmich with a cross.
Offside, Côte d'Ivoire. Franck Kessie is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Kai Havertz (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Florian Wirtz.
First Half begins.
Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
